headline: Buffett Steps Aside: Abel's First Berkshire 13F Buys Delta Air Lines, Exits Visa And Mastercard
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B) is no longer run by Warren Buffett, with Greg Abel as CEO. New positions in Delta, Macy's, Alphabet C. Exits include Visa, Mastercard, UnitedHealth, Domino's, Aon, Pool, Amazon, Heico, Formula One.

headline: CMS Admin. Dr. Oz: We can double the life expectancy of Medicare trust fund if we fix the fraud
summary: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services Administrator Dr. Mehmet Oz joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the new industry-wide coalition of 29 healthcare companies to simplify prior authorization for medical treatment, fighting healthcare fraud, and more.

headline: UnitedHealthcare Community Plan of Idaho Provides More Than $425,000 to Help Build Healthier Communities Statewide
summary: UnitedHealthcare Community Plan of Idaho today announced it provided more than $425,000 in financial support to community organizations for new and existing programs that address everyday barriers...
